title: saxifraga gibraltarica
intro: Saxifraga gibraltarica, also known as Gibraltar saxifrage, is a rare and endangered alpine plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Saxifraga gibraltarica include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
